findings.title: Scheduled workflow consumes recurring minutes
findings.why_it_costs: Scheduled runs execute whether or not client-facing work changed.
findings.safe_replacement: Gate schedules with path checks, reduce frequency, or run local nightly scans.

findings.title: Scheduled workflow consumes recurring minutes
findings.why_it_costs: Scheduled runs execute whether or not client-facing work changed.
findings.safe_replacement: Gate schedules with path checks, reduce frequency, or run local nightly scans.

findings.title: Scheduled workflow consumes recurring minutes
findings.why_it_costs: Scheduled runs execute whether or not client-facing work changed.
findings.safe_replacement: Gate schedules with path checks, reduce frequency, or run local nightly scans.

findings.title: Broad cache restore keys can grow cache usage
findings.why_it_costs: Cache storage above included per-repository allowance can become billable.
findings.safe_replacement: Use narrow cache keys, dependency lockfile hashes, and periodic cache cleanup.

findings.title: Artifact upload without retention-days
findings.why_it_costs: Artifacts accrue storage charges until they expire or are deleted.
findings.safe_replacement: Set retention-days to 1-7 for diagnostics and 14-30 only for release evidence.

findings.title: Codespaces/devcontainer config present
findings.why_it_costs: Cloud dev environments can accrue compute and storage while active or retained.
findings.safe_replacement: Prefer local VS Code/devcontainer runs for daily work; keep Codespaces for client demos only.

findings.title: Container image publishing may create package storage
findings.why_it_costs: GitHub Packages shares storage allowance with Actions artifacts.
findings.safe_replacement: Use local image builds by default, prune old package versions, and publish only release images.

findings.title: Set budget alerts before enabling metered products
findings.why_it_costs: Actions, storage, Codespaces, and AI usage can continue until a budget or payment block stops it.
findings.safe_replacement: Set soft budgets and email alerts at 50%, 75%, 90%, and 100% for the account or organization.

recommendations.action: Use GitHub Pages for static client previews before paid hosting.
Run heavy test suites locally or on self-hosted runners before GitHub-hosted CI.
Set artifact retention-days on every upload-artifact step.
Turn off paid AI/code review automation except on final PR review passes.
Use laptop-local dev servers for everyday work and reserve cloud dev environments for demos.
